title: Nevixity's modpack
description:
A modpack that allows builders and thinkers to build, think and create. with the new mods added in this modpack
 
and its made to make the player explore the world more with the new structures to brave and conquer.
body:
this modpack is focused around taming/fighting new mobs and bosses it has to offer as well as new 
redstone mechanics and exploring the new biomes and structures!


ps: there is less content right now because some mods are not on modrinth yet. if they get added to modrinth i will make sure to update this modpack
